citation.description: module-size-allowlist.txt and module-size-ceilings.txt are absent from .github/; spot-checks of likely-large files (outbound_differ.py ends ~line 771, dispatch_one.py ends ~line 748, inbound_differ.py ends before line 750) confirm no file exceeds 800 LOC; test_allowlist_mechanism_removed() asserts both files absent and test_no_src_module_over_the_hard_cap() enforces the cap at runtime

criteria.criterion: .github/module-size-allowlist.txt no longer exists (or is empty) and no src/rebar/**/*.py file exceeds 800 LOC

citation.description: Contract test replaced with absolute-cap tests (test_no_src_module_over_the_hard_cap, test_allowlist_mechanism_removed); gerrit-verify.yaml lines 164-205 and test.yml lines 199-240 implement Module-size gate with no allowlist branch — absolute cap only

criteria.criterion: The allowlist/ceilings mechanism (both files + the sync contract test + the shell gate's allowlist branch) is removed; CI still fails any new over-cap file

citation.description: Both test.yml (lines 199-240) and gerrit-verify.yaml (lines 164-205) fetch main's limit from .github/module-size-limit.txt, compare it to the change's limit, and fail if they differ: 'module-size limit changed ... an administrator must override this gate (force-submit)'. Documented in docs/architecture.md lines 255-263.

criteria.criterion: A hard gate blocks changing the 800 limit through the normal contribution process (admin manual override required); documented

citation.description: Ticket comment by Joe Oakhart (2026-07-19T01:20Z) attests all 15 Gerrit changes (#790-#808) are MERGED, naming specific change numbers, ticket->change mapping, query method (GET /a/changes/<n>), and URLs (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/<n>). Codebase corroboration: the code changes from those merges are demonstrably present (allowlist removed, absolute gate in both workflows, new contract test).

criteria.criterion: Every child story landed on main via Gerrit (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1)
